definitions.text: Another time: indicating a repeat of an action. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: I enjoyed it so much I went again the next day.

definitions.text: Back (to a former place or state).
examples: We need to bring the old customs to life again.

definitions.text: Over and above a factor of one.
examples: This stick is quite long, but that other one is half as long again.
